name: Monastery Herbal Sausage
recipeIngredient: 200 grams Green Pork Back Fat or Fatty
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince the pork, beef, and fat through an 8mm disc.
2. Mix herbs and spices in a bowl.
3. Sprinkle the mixture over the meat mass and mix everything together by hand for 5-10 minutes.
4. Fit a funnel to the mixer and fill pork casings.
5. Twist into rolls of your desired length.
